calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-17-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Mangini for Michelle Lefleur (Petitioner/Administrator).

The Court stated that the Administrator had agreed to reduce fees from $5,000.00 to $1,890.00. Mr. Mangini reported that there were a number of issues regarding the sale of the three properties. In addition, he stated that the properties had to sell fast, that he had to get the Son out of one of the properties, and that escrow had been started in Sacramento and transferred to San Francisco. The Court questioned why Mr. Mangini handled the real estate rather than the agent. Mr. Mangini stated that he was pushing to sell the properties, that he had consulted with a landlord tenant attorney, and that there were judgments against the decedent on the properties. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Hill.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-25-2006 Granted Per Written Order
